name: From Reconstruction to Interpretation: Zero-Setup Multi-Phase Segmentation of X-ray Tomography Data
summary: arXiv:2607.12175v3 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: X-ray tomography enables nondestructive characterization of material microstructures, while advances in micro-CT imaging have accelerated v...
description: arXiv:2607.12175v3 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: X-ray tomography enables nondestructive characterization of material microstructures, while advances in micro-CT imaging have accelerated volumetric data acquisition and reconstruction. However, rapid interpretation remains limited by image segmentation, which often requires manual thresholding, user prompting, or material-specific model...
author: Pradyumna Elavarthi, Arun J. Bhattacharjee, Harrison Lisabeth, Anca Ralescu, Petrus H. Zwart, Dilworth Parkinson, Elizabeth G. Clark
